allow: PowerShell(python -c "import sys, fastapi, sqlalchemy; print\(sys.executable\); print\('fastapi', fastapi.__version__\)")

PowerShell(try { $h = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "health: $\($h.StatusCode\) $\($h.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "health failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/companies?status=active&scope=directory" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "companies: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "companies failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login" -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@example.com","password":"admin12345"}'; $token = $login.access_token; Write-Output "login ok, role token acquired"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/companies?status=active&scope=directory" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "companies: $\($r.StatusCode\), bytes: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Output "companies failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess; Write-Output "PID $\($p.Id\): $\($p.ProcessName\)"; try { $wmi = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.Id\)"; Write-Output "  cmd: $\($wmi.CommandLine\)"; Write-Output "  cwd-exe: $\($wmi.ExecutablePath\)" } catch {} })

PowerShell($root = "C:\\Users\\charan tej\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\kyc-compliance-autonomous-agent-develop-integrated"; Test-Path $root; Get-ChildItem "$root\\datasets\\processed" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length; Get-ChildItem $root -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($procid in $pids\) { $wmi = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$procid"; Write-Output "PID ${procid}: $\($wmi.CommandLine\)" })

PowerShell($b = "C:\\Users\\charan tej\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\kyc-compliance-autonomous-agent-develop-integrated\\backend\\app"; Select-String -Path "$b\\routes\\companies.py" -Pattern "Depends|import" | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.LineNumber\): $\($_.Line.Trim\(\)\)" }; Write-Output "=== settings diff ==="; $sA = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\charan tej\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\kyc-compliance-integrated\\backend\\app\\config\\settings.py"; $sB = Get-Content "$b\\config\\settings.py"; Compare-Object $sA $sB | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.SideIndicator\) $\($_.InputObject\)" })
Bash(python -c "import sqlalchemy, rapidfuzz, psycopg2; print\('deps ok'\)")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 23960 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 16332 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $left = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($left\) { Write-Output "port 8000 still occupied by PID $\($left.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "port 8000 free" })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 16332 -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $left = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($left\) { Write-Output "still occupied: $\($left.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "port 8000 free" })

PowerShell(try { $spec = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/openapi.json" -TimeoutSec 10; $hasPdf = $spec.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains "/api/v1/reports/sar/{sar_id}/pdf"; Write-Output "serving THIS workspace's code \(PDF route present\): $hasPdf" } catch { Write-Output "backend not reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; exit }; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login" -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@example.com","password":"admin12345"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/companies?status=active&scope=directory" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $\($login.access_token\)"} -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "companies endpoint: OK, $\($r.Count\) rows returned")
